```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=7}
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_n_line
ggsave(here("figures", "n_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")

# Population Model
fit_p_line <- fit_plot_data %>% 
  mutate(p = toTitleCase(p)) %>% 
  group_by(p, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = p, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Population Model", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Population Model and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_p_line
ggsave(here("figures", "p_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")

# Analysis Model 
fit_m_line <- fit_plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toTitleCase(m)) %>% 
  group_by(m, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = m, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Analysis Model", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rate by Analysis Model and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_m_line
ggsave(here("figures", "m_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")

# Direct Effect
fit_de_line<- fit_plot_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(de)) %>%  # Corrected filtering of NA values
  mutate(de = fct_explicit_na(de, na_level = "NA"),  
         de = fct_relevel(de, "0.405", "0.9", "1.5"))  %>% 
  rename(`Split` = k_split,
         `DE` = de) %>% 
  group_by(`DE`, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = `DE`, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Direct Effect", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Direct Effect and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_de_line
ggsave(here("figures", "de_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=5, width=7, units="in")

# Class Proportion
fit_k_line <- fit_plot_data %>% 
  rename(`Split` = k_split,
         `DE` = de) %>% 
  mutate(`Split` = toTitleCase(`Split`)) %>% 
  group_by(`Split`, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = `Split`, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Class Proportion", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Class Proportion and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_k_line
ggsave(here("figures", "k_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")

# Separation
fit_sep_line <- fit_plot_data %>% 
  rename(`Separation` = separation,
         `DE` = de) %>% 
  mutate(`Separation` = toTitleCase(`Separation`)) %>% 
  group_by(`Separation`, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = `Separation`, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Separation", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Separation and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_sep_line
ggsave(here("figures", "sep_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")


# Measurement
fit_model_line <- fit_plot_data %>% 
  rename(`Measurement Model` = model,
         `DE` = de) %>% 
  mutate(`Measurement Model` = toTitleCase(`Measurement Model`)) %>% 
  group_by(`Measurement Model`, fit_index) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = `Measurement Model`, y = mean_prop_correct, group = fit_index, color = fit_index)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Measurement Model", 
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Measurement Model and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
fit_model_line
ggsave(here("figures", "model_fit_int.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=5, units="in")
```


Combine:

```{r}
no_y_axis <- theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )

combined_plot <- (
  fit_p_line + labs(title = NULL) |
    fit_m_line  + labs(title = NULL) + no_y_axis |
    fit_n_line + labs(title = NULL) + no_y_axis
) /
  (
    fit_sep_line + labs(title = NULL) |
      fit_de_line + labs(title = NULL) + no_y_axis |
      fit_k_line + labs(title = NULL) + no_y_axis |
      fit_model_line + labs(title = NULL) + no_y_axis
  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "Average Recovery Rates Across Model Selection Criterion and Study Conditions", tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(
      family = "serif",
      size = 16,
      color = "black"
    ),
    # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 14,
      color = "black",
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
combined_plot
ggsave(here("figures", "fit_lineplots_combined.jpeg"), height = 7, width = 12, dpi="retina", bg = "white",  units="in")

```


## Fit x N x *Condition* Lineplot

```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height= 9}

# All Sim Models
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(sim_model = toupper(sim_model)) %>% 
  group_by(N, fit_index, sim_model) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~sim_model, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size (N)",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Sample Size and Simulation Models"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
ggsave(here("figures", "p1234_m123_N_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=7, width=9, units="in")

# P34 x M123
fit_plot_data %>% 
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>%  
  mutate(m = toTitleCase(m),
         p = toTitleCase(p)) %>% 
  rename(`Split` = k_split,
         `DE` = de) %>% 
  group_by(m, fit_index, N) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_grid(~ m, labeller = label_value) +
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size (N)",
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Sample Size, Analysis Model, and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "m123_N_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=8, units="in")

# DE
plot_data %>% 
  group_by(N, fit_index, de) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  #mutate(de = fct_explicit_na(de, na_level = "NA"),  
  #       de = fct_relevel(de, "NA", "0.405", "0.9", "1.5"))  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~de, labeller = labeller(de = function(x) paste("Direct Effects:", x))) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size (N)",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Sample Size and Direct Effects"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "de_N_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=5, width=9, units="in")


# DE X M X Fit
fit_plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>% 
  group_by(m, fit_index, de) %>%
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>%  
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  #mutate(de = fct_explicit_na(de, na_level = "NA"),  
  #       de = fct_relevel(de, "NA", "0.405", "0.9", "1.5"))  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = de, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~m, labeller = labeller(de = function(x) paste("Direct Effects:", x))) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Direct Effects",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Direct Effect, Analysis Model, and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "de_m_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=4, width=8, units="in")


# P34 x M123 x DE x Fit
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>% 
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>% 
  group_by(de, p, fit_index, m) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = de, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_grid(p ~ m, labeller = label_value) +
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Direct Effect",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Direct Effect, Population and Analysis Models, and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "p34_m123_de_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=5, width=10, units="in")


# P34 x M123 x Sep x Fit
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>%  
  group_by(separation, p, fit_index, m) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = separation, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_grid(p ~ m, labeller = label_value) +
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Separation",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Separation, Population and Analysis Models, and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "p34_m123_sep_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=5, width=10, units="in")



# P34 x M123 x Model x Fit
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>% 
  mutate(model = toTitleCase(model)) %>% 
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>%  
  group_by(model, p, fit_index, m) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_grid(p ~ m, labeller = label_value) +
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Measurement Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Measurement Model, Population and Analysis Models, and Model Selection Criterion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "p34_m123_model_fit.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", height=5, width=10, units="in")
```


## Separation x *Condition* Bar

```{r}
# N
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Sample Size",
       x = "N",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )



# Class Proportion
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>%
  mutate(k_split = toTitleCase(k_split)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = k_split, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Class Proportion",
       x = "Class Proportion",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# DE
plot_data %>% 
  #filter(!is.na(de)) %>%  # Corrected filtering of NA values
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = de, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Direct Effect",
       x = "DE",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# P
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = p, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Population Model",
       x = "Population Model",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# M 
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = m, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Analysis Model",
       x = "Analysis Model",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# Measurement Model
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  mutate(model = toTitleCase(model)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(separation))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Average Recovery Rate by Separation and Measurement Model",
       x = "Measurement Model",
       y = "Average Recovery Rate",
       fill = "Separation") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors_2, levels(as.factor(toTitleCase(plot_data$separation))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
```


## Separation x Model Selection Criterion x *Condition* Lineplot

```{r}
# N
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  group_by(N, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = N, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Sample Size (N)",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Sample Size"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

# Class Proportion
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  mutate(k_split = toTitleCase(k_split)) %>% 
  group_by(k_split, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = k_split, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Class Proportion",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Class Proportion"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

# DE
plot_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(de)) %>%  # Corrected filtering of NA values
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  group_by(de, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = de, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Direct Effect",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Direct Effect"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

# P
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>%
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  group_by(p, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = p, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Population Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Population Model"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# M
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toupper(m),
         p = toupper(p)) %>%
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  group_by(m, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = m, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Analysis Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Analysis Model"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )


# Measurement Model
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(separation = toTitleCase(separation)) %>% 
  mutate(model = toTitleCase(model)) %>% 
  group_by(model, fit_index, separation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop_correct = mean(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prop_correct, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n())  # Standard error
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = mean_prop_correct, color = as.factor(fit_index), group = as.factor(fit_index))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Solid line for APA consistency
  geom_point(size = 3) +  # Increase point size for readability
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_prop_correct - se, ymax = mean_prop_correct + se), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.7) +  # APA-style error bars
  facet_wrap(~separation, labeller = label_value) +  # Better facet labels
  scale_color_manual(values = apa_colors) +  # Use defined APA color palette
  labs(
    x = "Measurement Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rates",
    color = "Model Selection Criterion",
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Model Selection Criterion, Separation, and Measurement Model"
  ) +
  ylim(0,1)+
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
```

## HeatMap

```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height= 9}
data <- plot_data %>% mutate(condition_combo = paste(N, k_split, model, de, sep = "_")) %>% 
  mutate(condition_combo = fct_reorder(condition_combo, prop_correct, .fun = mean, .desc = TRUE))

ggplot(data, aes(x = fit_index, y = condition_combo, fill = prop_correct)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "blue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = "Condition", fill = "Average Recovery Rate")
```


## N x P x M x Class Size x DE

```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height= 9}
# P12 x M12 x N
plot_data %>% 
  mutate(m = toTitleCase(m),
         p = toTitleCase(p)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("p3|p4", sim_model)) %>% 
  rename(`DE` = de) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = p, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(m))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~N) +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Simulation Models and Sample Size",
    x = "Population Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    fill = "Analysis Model"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(apa_colors, levels(as.factor(tools::toTitleCase(plot_data$m))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "p12_m12_N_bar.jpeg"), dpi="retina", bg = "white", units="in")


custom_labeller <- labeller(
  Sep = function(x) stringr::str_to_title(x),  
  N = label_both,
 `DE` = label_both
)

BIC_only %>% 
  mutate(m = toTitleCase(m),
         p = toTitleCase(p),
         separation = toTitleCase(separation),
         de = factor(case_when(
           de == 0.405 ~ "Small",
           de == 0.9 ~ "Medium",
           de == 1.5 ~ "Large",
           TRUE ~ as.character(de)  # Keeps other values unchanged
         ),
         levels = c("Small", "Medium", "Large"))) %>% 
  filter(sim_model != "p1m1",
         sim_model != "p2m1",
         sim_model != "p2m2") %>%
  rename(`DE` = de,
         `Sep` = separation) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = p, y = prop_correct, fill = as.factor(m))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               position = position_dodge(0.9), 
               width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  facet_grid(`DE` ~ N + `Sep`, labeller = custom_labeller) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Recovery Rates by Population and Analysis Models, Sample Size, Separation and Direct Effects",
    x = "Population Model",
    y = "Average Recovery Rate",
    fill = "Analysis Model"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = setNames(analysis_model_colors, levels(as.factor(tools::toTitleCase(BIC_only$m))))) +
  ylim(0,1) +
  theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 16, color = "black"),  # APA requires serif font
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),  # Center-align title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),  
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Facet labels bold
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),  
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Maintain clear placement for APA style
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave(here("figures", "p34_m123_N_sep_de_bar.jpeg"), dpi="retina", width = 12, bg = "white", units="in")

```
